NOTICE NOTICE OF PROOF OF SERVICE OF HEARING ON PETIITON FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER RSL FUNDING, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER RSL FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED, IN LIGHT OF THE EVIDENCES PRESENTED AND BASED ON THE NECESSARY STATUTORY PROCEDURES THAT HAD BEEN FOLLOWED, DISCLOSURES MADE AND THE DECLARATION OF THE TRANSFEROR INDICATING THAT HE IS FAMILIAR AND UNDERSTOOD THE TRANSACTION. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOYCE D. LONG, CSR # 8620 301/PJB
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-17-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER RSL FUNDING, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT HUESSO, SANTOS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RSL FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 301, TO BE HEARD SAME DAY. IMPROPERLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Petitioner RSL Funding, LLC'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights IS GRANTED, IN LIGHT OF THE EVIDENCES PRESENTED AND BASED ON THE NECESSARY STATUTORY PROCEDURES THAT HAD BEEN FOLLOWED, DISCLOSURES MADE AND THE DECLARATION OF THE TRANSFEROR INDICATING THAT HE IS FAMILIAR AND UNDERSTOOD THE TRANSACTION. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joyce D. Long, CSR # 8620 =301/PJB
